title: Veronica albiflora
taxonomy: Veronica albiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It belongs to the genus Veronica, which is a group of plants commonly known as speedwells. The Plantaginaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that are often found in wetland environments. Veronica albiflora is native to Western Australia and is known for its small white flowers. This species is classified as a perennial herb, meaning it grows and thrives for multiple years.
